message:
feat(conformance): add CI gate forensics infrastructure with machine-readable reports

- Add fp-ci-gates binary with CLI for commit/full pipeline selection,
  single-gate mode, fail-fast, sidecar verification, and JSON output
- Add rule_id() and repro_command() to CiGate for stable identifiers
  and failure replay commands
- Add CiGateForensicsEntry and CiForensicsReport structs for
  machine-readable violation reports with replay instructions
- Update CI workflow with cargo-llvm-cov and gate topology stage
  that uploads forensics artifacts
- Fix gate commands: add --workspace to G1, -D warnings to G2,
  scope G4/G5 to fp-conformance crate
- Add tests for rule ID stability and forensics report collection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,6 +24,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Create temp dirs
         run: mkdir -p .tmp .target
 
+      - name: Install cargo-llvm-cov
+        run: cargo install cargo-llvm-cov --locked
+
       - name: Format
         run: cargo fmt --check
 
@@ -44,3 +47,21 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Phase2C gate check
         run: ./scripts/phase2c_gate_check.sh
+
+      - name: CI gate topology (G1..G8) + forensics
+        if: always()
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p artifacts/ci
+          cargo run -p fp-conformance --bin fp-ci-gates -- \
+            --pipeline full \
+            --no-fail-fast \
+            --no-verify-sidecars \
+            --json-out artifacts/ci/gate_forensics.json
+
+      - name: Upload gate forensics artifact
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ci-gate-forensics
+          path: artifacts/ci/gate_forensics.json
+          if-no-files-found: warn
